originalTitle: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
title: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
content: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.

originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
content: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

originalTitle: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
title: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
content: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.

originalTitle: Rescuers dig through rubble after deadly Israeli strikes in south Lebanon
title: Rescuers dig through rubble after deadly Israeli strikes in south Lebanon
content: Rescuers are digging through rubble after a new wave of Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon killed at least 13.

originalTitle: Dozens feared dead in air strike on village in northeastern Nigeria
title: Dozens feared dead in air strike on village in northeastern Nigeria
content: Amnesty International says more than 100 people killed in military attack on a market in Jilli village.

originalTitle: US media trapped between oligarchy and presidency
title: US media trapped between oligarchy and presidency
content: American billionaires are gobbling up more and more media outlets.

originalTitle: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
title: Trump's Strait of Hormuz blockade threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
content: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.

originalTitle: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
title: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
content: Her infectious voice got fans dancing and singing, becoming the soundtrack for generations of Indians.

originalTitle: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
title: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
content: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.

originalTitle: Man City make statement in dominant win over Chelsea
title: Man City make statement in dominant win over Chelsea
content: Manchester City put three goals past Chelsea in a 17-minute spell at Stamford Bridge, to close the gap on leaders Arsenal to six points with a game in hand in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Sunderland sink Spurs in De Zerbi's opening game in charge
title: Sunderland sink Spurs in De Zerbi's opening game in charge
content: Sunderland's Nordi Mukiele scores the only goal in the Black Cats 1-0 home win against Tottenham, handing Roberto De Zerbi a loss in his first game in charge as Tottenham manager. The result leaves Spurs in the Premier League relegation zone.

originalTitle: Forest hit back to earn crucial point against Villa
title: Forest hit back to earn crucial point against Villa
content: Neco Williams scores his first goal since September to earn a 1-1 draw for Nottingham Forest against Aston Villa at the City Ground.
